scene_title: Cogumelo atomico vs cavalo de bronze
narrative_beat: Escala entre nuclear e cavalo em bronze

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a wide frame dominated by a monochrome gray mushroom cloud in the background rising from a devastated plain
subject.focal_point: a small bronze-gold miniature of a red horse on a stone pedestal in the foreground
subject.secondary: The scale contrast is brutal; no people; drifting embers between planes

composition.rule: rule of thirds, horse foreground / cloud background
composition.foreground: bronze horse and pedestal in rich gold-crimson
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white mushroom cloud, vast gray scale

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber foreground, gray background

symbolism.primary: ancient prophecy and modern annihilation side by side
symbolism.secondary: small horse as prophetic token foretold cloud

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
